chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 768 of 2014 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 20.10.2021 Mr. Sarfraz A. Akhund Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar Advocate for respondent No.3 Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, DAG <><><><><>....<><><><><> Counsel for the petitioner submits that as to objection regarding maintainability of this petition, he will not press the same and approach NIRC, however, he submits that this petition was filed immediately after termination, therefore, limitation, if any, may be condoned. In view of the above, the petition stands dismissed as withdrawn, whereas, petitioner may seek appropriate remedy before NIRC. As to limitation, it is expected that the issue would be considered sympathetically in view of the fact that this petition was presented way back in 2014 and was entertained as well immediately after the termination. With these observations, the petition stands disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI
